creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
> It changes everything.  Without "-o strictatime", Linux does "relatime", which basically means that it only updates atime once every 24 hours.

atime WAS UPDATED without strictatime.


With option got error: fuse: unknown option(s): `-o strictatime'



> All?  Of course not.  But I have tested several, and they all work fine.

Without testing all fuselib consumers you can not mark this as only sshfs bug.
